CVE-2025-69412.title: KDE messagelib before 25.11.90 ignores SSL errors for threatMatch ...
CVE-2025-69412.description: KDE messagelib before 25.11.90 ignores SSL errors for threatMatches:find in the Google Safe Browsing Lookup API (aka phishing API), which might allow spoofing of threat data. NOTE: this Lookup API is not contacted in the messagelib default configuration.
